metadata.name: Process a Credit Memo from a Vendor

description: A vendor has issued a credit memo for returned goods. The AP clerk needs to apply this credit to the vendor's account.

nodes.task_description: Receive and capture the data from the vendor credit memo.

expected_outcome.value: Agent extracts the vendor, credit memo number, and amount.

nodes.task_description: Post the credit memo to the vendor's account in the AP sub-ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully posts the credit, creating a negative balance for the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Apply the credit memo against an open invoice from the same vendor to reduce the amount that needs to be paid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully applies the credit to an open payable, reducing the net payment amount.
